summary: Frontend-only testing of ArticlesPage with enhanced 2-column Profi-Kalkulation modal. All 13 features tested and working correctly. The modal displays Stammdaten on left and Profi-Kalkulation on right with live calculation, history management, and VK price application.
passed_tests: Articles page loads at /articles with correct article count (15 Einträge gesamt)
Clicking edit (pencil icon) on article card opens enhanced 2-column modal
Left side shows STAMMDATEN section with Typ, Name, Nummer, Einheit, Beschreibung, EK/VK prices
Right side shows PROFI-KALKULATION section with toggle button
Kalkulation auto-opens and pre-fills from last saved kalkulation (EK=20, Meister=3, Geselle=3)
Zeitanteile fields show 4 wage levels (Meister=77€, Geselle=72€, Azubi=26€, Helfer=69€) with correct rates from settings
Live calculation updates: changing Meister from 3 to 4 hours updates VK from 590.11€ to 687.15€
VK-Preis übernehmen button fills VK price (590.11) into form AND saves kalkulation to history
Toast message 'VK-Preis 590.11 € übernommen & Kalkulation gespeichert' appears after apply
Historie toggle shows past calculations with expandable details (3 entries after test)
'Diese Kalkulation laden' loads historical values into the form with toast 'Kalkulation geladen'
Creating new article ('Neuer Eintrag' modal) has Kalkulation section available with 'Kalkulation starten' button
Marge display shows correct percentage (96.6%) when EK=20 and VK=590.11
Speichern button present for saving article changes
Modal title shows 'Bearbeiten' for existing articles, 'Neuer Eintrag' for new ones
Historie badge shows entry count (displayed as '3' after adding new calculation)
critical_code_review_comments: 2-column layout implemented correctly with grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Live calculation formula correct: EK + Lohnkosten + Sonstige + Material% + Gewinn% = VK
History entries sorted by created_at descending
Modal size='xl' (max-w-6xl) provides adequate space for 2-column layout
seed_data_creation: Added 1 new kalkulation entry during testing (article 'Einrüstkosten/Sicherheitsrelevant' now has 3+ history entries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ArticlesPage Profi-Kalkulation modal fully tested and working. Key test IDs: btn-toggle-kalk, artikel-kalk-panel, modal-kalk-apply, btn-toggle-modal-historie, modal-kalk-historie, modal-btn-load-entry-{idx}. Test article 'Einrüstkosten/Sicherheitsrelevant' has 3+ history entries. Wage rates from settings: Meister=77€, Geselle=72€, Azubi=26€, Helfer=69€.
